creator: unr34lgaming@gmail.com
text:
On FreeNAS 9.3 using Jails (FreeBSD 9.3-RELEASE-p31).

Updated to latest version now the service wont start. Reverting to 383236 fixed it.

Looked for error logs can't find any relevant.

Things I tried:
 Created a fresh jail, updated and installed from audio/teamspeak3-server.
